---
title: "Logic Labs"
format:
  html:
    css: lab.css
---

::: {.lab-nav}
[Logic Labs](index.qmd) | [Logisim Tutorial](logisim-tutorial.qmd) | [Lab 1](lab1.qmd) | [Lab 2](lab2.qmd) | [Lab 3](lab3.qmd) | [Lab 4](lab4.qmd) | [Lab 5](lab5.qmd) | [Lab 6](lab6.qmd)
:::

::: {.tutorial-callout}
::: {.tutorial-callout-icon}
⚙️
:::
::: {.tutorial-callout-body}
**New to Logisim? Start here.**
All labs use [Logisim Evolution](logisim-tutorial.qmd) as the circuit simulator. Before attempting any lab, read the [Logisim Tutorial](logisim-tutorial.qmd) — it covers installation, navigation, component usage, and common debugging pitfalls.
:::
:::

::: {.lab-grid}
::: {.lab-card}
::: {.lab-version}
1s2526
:::
### Combinational Logic
- [Lab 1: Say my Student Number](lab1.qmd)
- [Lab 2: Analog Sticks](lab2.qmd)
- [Lab 3: ALU Flags](lab3.qmd)
:::
::: {.lab-card}
::: {.lab-version}
1s2526
:::
### Sequential Logic
- [Lab 4: Flip-flop Flavors](lab4.qmd)
- [Lab 5: Moving Dot](lab5.qmd)
- [Lab 6: Keyboard](lab6.qmd)
:::
:::
